title: Characterization Step (Simplified Input)
description: A user-friendly form to describe a single characterization step (measurement, test, or analysis). Provide a name, the specimens or materials being characterised, and any quantitative test conditions. This input will be automatically converted to a standardised RDF representation (OBI/PMDCo OO-LD).

step_name.title: Step Name
step_name.description: A human-readable name for this characterization step. Example: 'Tensile test specimen 1', 'Vickers hardness batch A'.

step_id.title: Step ID
step_id.description: Optional. Identifier (IRI slug) for this step in the RDF graph. Auto-derived from step_name if omitted.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional free-text description of this characterization step.

inputs.title: Specimen / Material IRIs
inputs.description: IRIs of the specimens or materials being characterised. Reference existing knowledge-graph nodes.

preceded_by.title: Preceded By (Step IRIs)
preceded_by.description: IRIs of characterization steps that directly precede this one.

conditions.title: Test Conditions / Parameters
conditions.description: Quantitative conditions under which this step is carried out.
